name: vsphere
description: VMware vSphere infrastructure management via govc (govmomi CLI). Ask Claude to run any govc command — VMs, hosts, datastores, networks, snapshots, and more.

tools.name: govc
tools.description:
Run any govc command against vSphere. Pass all arguments after 'govc' as an array.

Examples:
- List VMs: ["ls", "/datacenter/vm"]
- VM details: ["vm.info", "my-vm"]
- Power on VM: ["vm.power", "-on", "my-vm"]
- Power off VM: ["vm.power", "-off", "my-vm"]
- List hosts: ["ls", "/datacenter/host"]
- List datastores: ["datastore.info", "*"]
- VM snapshot: ["snapshot.create", "-vm", "my-vm", "snap1"]
- Clone VM: ["vm.clone", "-vm", "template-vm", "-on=false", "new-vm"]
